params.message: {{platform === 'win32' ? 'venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt' : 'venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt'}}

{{platform === 'win32' ? 'venv\\Scripts\\activate && python -c "from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download; snapshot_download(repo_id=\'fishaudio/s2-pro\', local_dir=\'models/s2-pro\')"' : 'source venv/bin/activate && python -c "from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download; snapshot_download(repo_id=\'fishaudio/s2-pro\', local_dir=\'models/s2-pro\')"'}}
